---
title: "Publications"
bibliography: references.bib
csl: ieee.csl
nocite: |
  @*
citeproc: false
filters:
  - group-refs.lua
---

Peer-reviewed work, grouped by type and listed newest-first. 

::: {.profile-links}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard-fill"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=dRuC1OoAAAAJ&hl){.profile-link}
[<i class="bi bi-book-half"></i> Semantic Scholar](https://www.semanticscholar.org/author/Ziang-Liu/2117941724){.profile-link}
[<i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1364-3502){.profile-link}
[<i class="bi bi-caret-right-fill"></i> researchmap](https://researchmap.jp/liu.ziang){.profile-link}
[<i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Ziang-Liu-4){.profile-link}
:::




<!-- ## Work in Progress

## Waiting for publication

## Published Works -->

::: {#refs}
:::
